seo.title: Building AI Email Assistant with n8n AI Agents + Vex Guardrails
seo.description: Learn how to build ai email assistant with n8n AI Agents + Vex guardrails. Detect failures, prevent drift, and ensure reliability.
keywords: n8n AI Agents ai email assistant

content.intro: Build powerful AI Email Assistants using n8n AI Agents to automate intent detection, draft generation, attachment handling, and approval workflows. These agentic workflows process incoming emails with complex chains of AI nodes, but introduce risks like unvalidated outputs leading to inappropriate sends or PII leaks. Vex guardrails ensure reliability by validating AI outputs before critical actions like emailing.

architectureOverview.heading: AI Email Assistant Architecture with n8n AI Agents
architectureOverview.description:
The typical n8n AI Email Assistant starts with an Email Trigger node (IMAP/Gmail) that captures incoming messages. An AI Agent node with intent detection tools classifies the email (e.g., 'urgent_reply', 'schedule_meeting', 'forward_internal') and extracts key entities like recipient, priority, and attachments.

Subsequent AI Agent nodes handle specialized tasks: one generates draft responses with tone adaptation, another processes attachments via tools, and a memory window node maintains conversation context. Action nodes (Send Email, Calendar API) execute only after approval workflows, but lack validation exposes risks like sending confidential data to wrong recipients.

Vex integrates as a Webhook node after each AI Agent, verifying outputs against PII filters, tone rules, recipient validation, and confidentiality policies before passing to action nodes.

risks.name: Unvalidated AI Outputs to Email Nodes
risks.description: AI Agent generates drafts with inappropriate tone or wrong recipients without validation before Send Email node
risks.mitigation: Insert Vex Webhook node after AI Agent to validate tone, recipient domains, and content accuracy

risks.name: PII Exposure in Agent Tool Calls
risks.description: Intent detection tools receive raw email content containing customer PII, risking credential exposure
risks.mitigation: Pre-filter emails through Vex PII detection before AI Agent processing

risks.name: Recursive Workflow Triggers
risks.description: Sent email replies trigger the same workflow, causing infinite agent execution loops
risks.mitigation: Vex validates sender domain and conversation ID to prevent self-triggering

risks.name: Stale Memory Context Injection
risks.description: Memory window nodes inject outdated conversation history, causing contextually wrong responses
risks.mitigation: Vex timestamps and relevance-scores memory context before AI Agent consumption

implementation.title: n8n AI Agent Intent Detection Node
implementation.description: Core AI Agent node for classifying email intent and extracting action parameters

implementation.title: Draft Generation AI Agent
implementation.description: Generates context-aware email drafts based on intent classification

implementation.title: Email Send Action Node
implementation.description: Final action node that sends validated email drafts

implementation.title: Memory Context Node
implementation.description: Maintains conversation history for context-aware responses

vexIntegration.title: Vex PII Filter Webhook After Email Trigger
vexIntegration.description: Scans incoming emails for PII before AI Agent processing

vexIntegration.title: Vex Tone & Recipient Validation After Draft Agent
vexIntegration.description: Validates generated drafts for tone appropriateness and recipient validation

vexIntegration.title: Vex Final Send Approval Gate
vexIntegration.description: Final confidentiality and accuracy check before email send
